title: Rest API Generator
description: A component that assembles REST request configuration (URL, method, headers, auth, query params and body) and emits a normalized output JSON.

props.name: value
props.description: Initial output JSON to load into the editor.

events.name: onValueChange
events.description: Emitted whenever the composed REST output changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the request URL in the generated REST output.
 *
 * @param e - Value changed event containing the new URL.
 * @returns void
 */
urlHandler(e: AXValueChangedEvent<any>): void

/**
 * Updates the HTTP method in the generated REST output.
 *
 * @param e - Value changed event containing the selected method.
 * @returns void
 */
methodHandler(e: AXValueChangedEvent<any>): void
